generation.image_prompt: Including exactly one golden pentacle held by a regal anthropomorphic leopard cat queen sitting on a stone throne in a blossoming garden. 1900s mystical lithography style. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. Many golden pentacles are carved into the throne and visible in the background flora. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat face, white ear spots, forehead stripes. No borders. Full bleed.
generation.narrative: The Queen of Pentacles is 'The Nurturer of the Land'—the female whose presence and health are the ultimate indicators of a thriving ecosystem.

meanings.upright: Abundance, nurturing, sensory pleasure, and the earth mother providing sanctuary for all living beings.
meanings.reversed: Restlessness, burnout, or a return to world before full recovery.

ecology.habitat_fragment: 受保護的森林洞穴/樹洞
ecology.risk_theme: 壓力導致的免疫力下降
ecology.mapping_note: Queen of Pentacles represents 'Habitat Productivity'—a highly fertile and safe breeding area that supports high biodiversity.
ecology.zh: 棲地樣貌：受保護的森林洞穴/樹洞 。 生存威脅：壓力導致的免疫力下降 。 牌義關聯：Queen of Pentacles represents 'Habitat Productivity'—a highly fertile and safe breeding area that supports high biodiversity. 。 石虎特徵：台灣石虎 。 生命階段：成年

website.excerpt: The 錢幣皇后 reimagined as a story of survival and material prosperity for the Taiwan leopard cat.
website.seo_description: Abundance, nurturing, sensory pleasure, and the earth mother providing sanctuary for all living beings.

meaning.zh: 豐饒、母性、感官享受，以及為所有生物提供庇護的大地母親。
meaning.en: Abundance, nurturing, sensory pleasure, and the earth mother providing sanctuary for all living beings.
